\tzpentry{ID5103}{As Complex Scalar Field Compute Vorticity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5103 introduces As Complex Scalar Field Compute Vorticity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\Psi\) as a complex scalar field and compute the vorticity via the phase: vorticity = \((1/2\pi)\oint_C d(\arg\Psi)\)
\]
